title: The Insecticides Act, 1968
full_text: The Insecticides Act, 1968 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196846 Act Number: 46 Enactment Date: 1968-09-02 Act Year: 1968 Short Title: The Insecticides Act, 1968 Long Title: An Act to regulate the import, manufacture, sale, transport, distribution and use of insecticides with a view to prevent risk to human beings or animals, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agriculture, Cooperation and Farmers Welfare Enforcement Date: 01-03-1971 Notification: 1st March, 1971, vide notification No. G.S.R. 300, dated 27th February, 1971, in respect of ss. 4, 7, 8 and 36, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). 1st August, 1971, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1108, dated the 28th July, 1971, in respect of remaining provisions see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Insecticides Act, 1968 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Application of other laws not barred. Section 3. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. The Central Insecticides Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Registration Committee. Section 6. Other committees. Section 7. Procedure for Board. Section 8. Secretary and other officers. Section 9. Registration of insecticides. Section 10. Appeal against non-registration or cancellation. Section 11. Power of revision of Central Government. Section 12. Licensing officers. Section 13. Grant of licence. Section 14. Revocation, suspension and amendment of licences. Section 15. Appeal against the decision of a licensing officer. Section 16. Central Insecticides Laboratory. Section 17. Prohibition of import and manufacture of certain insecticides. Section 18. Prohibition of sale, etc., of certain insecticides. Section 19. Insecticide Analysts. Section 20. Insecticide Inspectors. Section 21. Powers of Insecticide Inspectors. Section 22. Procedure to be followed by Insecticide Inspectors. Section 23. Persons bound to disclose place where insecticides are manufactured or kept. Section 24. Report of Insecticide Analyst. Section 25. Confiscation. Section 26. Notification of poisoning. Section 27. Prohibition of sale, etc., of insecticides for reasons of public safety. Section 28. Notification of cancellation of registration, etc. Section 29. Offences and punishment. Section 30. Defences which may or may not be allowed in prosecutions under this Act. Section 31. Cognizance and trial of offences. Section 31A. Special Courts. Section 32. Repealed. Section 33. Offences by companies. Section 34. Power of Central Government to give directions Section 35. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 36. Power of Central Government to make rules Section 37. Power of the State Governments to make rules. Section 38. Exemption. Schedule 1.
